monitor.capture_what: return value of the sayhi Flask view function, which is the rendered output of render_template_string

oracle_check.condition_description: The return value contains introspection attributes (e.g., __class__, __mro__, __subclasses__, __globals__, __builtins__) or Flask config markers (<Config) that prove the injected Jinja2 expression was evaluated by the template engine, confirming SSTI.
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_TEMPLATE_INJECTION: SSTI payload evaluated in render_template_string output — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
